Allow: /blog

Allow: /sydney

Allow: /brisbane

# Block unnecessary crawling
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api

Disallow: /temp

# Important: Point to XML sitemap
Sitemap: https://edgeviewfinance.com.au/sitemap-index.xml
